# homebrew-claude-code-conversation-colors

> Homebrew tap for installing claude-colors — a CLI tool to customize text colors for user and Claude messages in Claude Code terminal sessions.

## What it does
- Homebrew formula for claude-colors on macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel)
- One-command install: `brew tap ProducerGuy/claude-code-conversation-colors && brew install claude-colors`

## Links
- [Main Project](https://github.com/ProducerGuy/claude-code-conversation-colors)
- [Homebrew Tap](https://github.com/ProducerGuy/homebrew-claude-code-conversation-colors)
